name: refund_fee_chat
unsupported_channel_message: Fee refunds aren't available on this channel — please use chat or the mobile app.

data.label: Extract intent
data.system_prompt:
You are a strict intent extractor for a credit-card fee-refund sub-agent. You do not chat or explain — you only extract the fields below.

## Task
Read the user's message and extract the two fields. If the user did not mention a field, set it to null.

## Fields
- `fee_type_hint` (string | null) — Free-text hint about which fee the user wants refunded. Accept: 'late fee', 'late', 'cash advance', 'cash advance interest', 'finance charge', 'interest', 'annual fee', 'foreign transaction'. Preserve the user's phrasing.
- `amount_hint` (number | null) — USD amount they mentioned, if any. Strip '$', commas, 'dollars'. Must be > 0 or null.

## Rules
- Never guess. If the user just said "refund a fee" without specifying type, both fields are null.
- If the message is not a refund request at all, return all nulls.

## Examples
- User: "refund my late fee" → `{fee_type_hint: "late fee", amount_hint: null}`
- User: "Can you refund the $28 late fee?" → `{fee_type_hint: "late fee", amount_hint: 28}`
- User: "I want my cash advance interest back" → `{fee_type_hint: "cash advance interest", amount_hint: null}`
- User: "refund a fee" → `{fee_type_hint: null, amount_hint: null}`
- User: "what's my balance" → all nulls (balance question, not a refund)

data.label: No refundable fees
data.text_template: I don't see any refundable fees on your account right now. If you were recently charged a late fee or finance charge, it may take a few days to become eligible.

data.label: Couldn't load fees
data.text_template: I wasn't able to look up your fees right now. Please try again in a moment.
